syntax_2308.creator: thatandrew28
syntax_2308.title: Any Faction Players Online/Offline
syntax_2308.description: Whether any players of a faction are online/offline
syntax_2308.syntax_pattern:
any [faction] player[s] (is|are) online [(from|of)] [faction][s] %conquerfactions%
any [faction] player[s] (is(n't| not)|are(n't| not)) online [(from|of)] [faction][s] %conquerfactions%

en: Whether any players of a faction are online/offline

Represents a faction

syntax_2352.creator: thatandrew28
syntax_2352.title: Conquer Player
syntax_2352.description: Represents a faction player. An offline player/player will be automatically converted to this type. So normal players will work in all faction syntaxes

en: Represents a faction player. An offline player/player will be automatically converted to this type. So normal players will work in all faction syntaxes

syntax_2313.creator: thatandrew28
syntax_2313.title: Player has Faction
syntax_2313.description: Whether a player has a faction
syntax_2313.syntax_pattern:
%players% has [(are|is) in] (a) faction
%players% ((doesn't|does not) have|(aren't|are not) in) a faction

en: Whether a player has a faction

syntax_2315.creator: thatandrew28
syntax_2315.title: Warp of Faction Has Password
syntax_2315.description: Whether a warp of a faction has a password
syntax_2315.syntax_pattern:
[the] warp[s] [with] [name][s] %strings% (of|from) [the] [faction] %conquerfaction% (use[s]|ha(s|ve)) (a password|authentication)
[the] warp[s] [with] [name][s] %strings% (of|from) [the] [faction] %conquerfaction% (doesn't| does not|don't|do not) (use|has) (a password|authentication)

en: Whether a warp of a faction has a password

syntax_2336.title: MOTD of Faction

syntax_2350.creator: thatandrew28
syntax_2350.title: Conquer Claim
syntax_2350.description: Represents a claim (usually a chunk) which can be owned by the wilderness, a safe zone, a war zone, or even a faction.

en: Represents a claim (usually a chunk) which can be owned by the wilderness, a safe zone, a war zone, or even a faction.
